event: The Conjuror — a street magician deceiving onlookers
description: A colorful scene showing a street conjuror in a red robe and tall black hat performing a cups-and-balls trick on a wooden table for a group of gaping spectators. The crowd of about eight figures in varied medieval dress leans in, fascinated by the trick. One figure in white bends far forward over the table. Behind the conjuror, a small dog or owl sits near the table. A stone wall and green sky form the backdrop. A ring and small ball lie on the ground near the table.
